name: co.gemina/filetag
description: Remote MCP server for tagging PDFs and images. Free tier (1,500 tags/month). Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, Cline, Windsurf, Hermes, OpenClaw.

license.note: The MCP server itself is a hosted closed-source service. Examples and install snippets in the linked repository are MIT-licensed.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Gemina API key. Get a free key (1,500 tags/month, no credit card) at https://console.gemina.co/registration/create-account

alternateAuth.description: Bearer-token equivalent of the X-API-Key header. Either auth method is accepted; the same key works for both.

tools.name: files_create_upload
tools.description: Reserve a pre-signed upload slot. Returns file_id and a PUT URL to upload the document bytes to.

filename.description: Original filename. Used to infer content type if mimetype isn't provided.

tools.name: tag_file
tools.description: Tag a previously-uploaded file by file_id. Returns metadata, six suggested filename patterns, and a short-lived enriched-file URL.

tools.name: tag_url
tools.description: Fetch and tag a publicly-accessible HTTPS URL directly. Returns metadata, six suggested filename patterns, and a short-lived enriched-file URL.

url.description: Publicly-accessible HTTPS URL of a PDF, PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP file.

rateLimits.monthly: 1,500 free tier; larger on paid plans
